content.text:
All 7 files have been created successfully. Here is a summary:

**Landing page components** (in `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\components\landing\`):

1. **`hero.tsx`** - Hero section with gradient background, animated SVG grid pattern, badge announcing public beta, headline with gradient text, CTA buttons (Start Free / View Pricing), and two product cards (DocAI and FeedbackAI).

2. **`features.tsx`** - Features section with two side-by-side columns. Left column showcases DocAI features (Smart Upload, AI Extraction, Custom Templates, Export Anywhere). Right column showcases FeedbackAI features (Survey Builder, Collect Responses, AI Analysis, Actionable Insights). Uses shadcn Card components with blue/purple color theming.

3. **`pricing-cards.tsx`** - Pricing section that renders plan cards from `PLANS` constants. Supports a "popular" badge, feature lists with check icons, and conditional CTA text (Get Started Free vs Start Free Trial).

4. **`testimonials.tsx`** - Testimonials section with three customer quotes displayed in a 3-column grid, each with avatar initials, name, role, and company.

5. **`footer.tsx`** - Footer with NexusAI branding, four link categories (Product, Resources, Company, Legal), and a copyright notice with dynamic year.

**Page routes** (in `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\`):

6. **`page.tsx`** - Main landing page that replaces the default Next.js starter. Includes a fixed navbar with glass-morphism effect, then composes Hero, Features, PricingCards, Testimonials sections, a gradient CTA section, and the Footer.

7. **`pricing/page.tsx`** - Dedicated pricing page with metadata for SEO, a simpler navbar, the PricingCards component, and the Footer.
